sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_modulo (a Int32, b Int32, result Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_modulo (a, b, result) VALUES (10, 3, modulo(10, 3));
INSERT INTO test_modulo (a, b, result) VALUES (25, -4, modulo(25, -4));
SELECT a, b, modulo(a, b) AS remainder FROM test_modulo WHERE b != 0;
UPDATE test_modulo SET result = modulo(a, b) WHERE b != 0;
